Post: BugReportPage animations + Word all-sprints export

blockers.description: Docker CLI not in WSL — use powershell.exe workaround
uvicorn --reload misses NTFS file changes — must docker restart backend after .py edits
check_sprints.py diagnostic file left in repo root — delete before next commit

human_actions_pending.action: Manual UAT: test xlsx and docx exports from both BugReportPage and SprintPage
human_actions_pending.context: All export endpoints updated. Verify stats block, No Sprint sheet, Completed status label all appear correctly.

decisions.decision: Bug xlsx: stats block (Total/Open/Resolved + Critical/High/Medium/Low with %) above bug table
Sprint xlsx: each sheet has metadata (Sprint/Status/Start/Release Date) + stats block + bug table
Sprint state display: released → Completed, active → Active, upcoming → Upcoming, archived → Archived
Sprint xlsx sheet order: known sprints (sprint_id DESC) + unknown + No Sprint last
No Sprint sheet captures all bugs with null sprint_name

next_action: Project complete. Clean up: git rm check_sprints.py. Then manual UAT of exports.
context_notes: All 5 phases done. This session fixed export quality: sprint xlsx had empty sheets (null sprint_name bugs dropped), added metadata/stats blocks to both xlsx exports, fixed state label. Backend requires docker restart after .py changes on NTFS (uvicorn watcher blind to NTFS).
